category_sources: source_facts.description says PDF converter to SVG; official homepage and GitHub README describe converting PDF pages to SVG using Poppler and Cairo.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is pdf2svg; official GitHub repository and homepage use pdf2svg.
docs_sources: Official homepage contains installation and usage; official GitHub README contains prerequisites and command syntax.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/dawbarton/pdf2svg; per instruction repo is returned as null and not re-evaluated.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies PDF-to-SVG conversion; official README states it uses Poppler and Cairo and shows pdf2svg CLI syntax.
